consent_scopes.label: Health Record Access
consent_scopes.description: Allow veterinary staff to view pet health records and timelines

consent_scopes.label: Health Record Updates
consent_scopes.description: Allow veterinary staff to add entries to pet health records

consent_scopes.label: Prescription & Pharmacy Access
consent_scopes.description: Allow pharmacy staff to view prescriptions and dispense medications

consent_scopes.label: Emergency Data Sharing
consent_scopes.description: Allow emergency responders to access pet records and share pre-arrival packets

consent_scopes.label: Administrative Audit Access
consent_scopes.description: Allow clinic administrators to view audit logs related to the owner's account

consent_scopes.label: Regulatory Evidence Export
consent_scopes.description: Allow export of anonymised or pseudonymised records for regulatory purposes
